title: RBI to conduct 4-day Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auction under LAF on May 25, 2026
description: On a review of current and evolving liquidity conditions, it has been decided to conduct a Variable Rate Repo (VRR) auction on Monday, May 25, 2026, as under: Sl. No. Notified Amount(₹ crore) Tenor (day) Window Timing Date of Reversal 1 1,50,000 4 09:30 AM to 10:00 AM May 29, 2026 (Friday) 2. The operational guidelines for the auction will be same as given in Reserve Bank’s Press Release 2021-2022/1572 dated January 20, 2022. Ajit Prasad
